item.title: 9 European summer destinations to beat the heat
item.description: Hop on the 'coolcation' trend and visit these European destinations offering milder summers.

item.title: Last chance: Earn $250 bonus cash back with the Chase Freedom Unlimited
item.description: Welcome offers on Chase Freedom cards provide compelling bonuses; consider applying now.

item.title: 10 'coolest' vacation spots to escape the heat this summer
item.description: Ten top destinations for hiking, skiing, or dining to escape summer heat.

item.title: Lufthansa's first Airbus A380 with upgraded business class debuts on flight to LAX
item.description: Lufthansa's upgraded A380 business class debuts on Munich-Los Angeles flights.

item.title: Could a jet fuel shortage really ruin your summer trip to Europe? What flyers should know
item.description: A potential jet fuel shortage in Europe raises concerns about flight cancellations.
